checks.acceptance_blocker: a crash or assertion failure leaves the same authorization reusable
checks.finding: the current entry point validates a reusable JSON freeze but never consumes a separate attempt token before governed work
checks.name: attempt-time single-use consumption

checks.acceptance_blocker: two concurrent processes can both observe absent output and begin
checks.finding: output existence is checked before work, but no exclusive claim/lock atomically consumes permission
checks.name: atomic concurrent-start exclusion

checks.acceptance_blocker: one attempted execution is not mechanically distinguished from an unregistered retry
checks.finding: the policy freezes one infrastructure retry but defines no consumed-attempt identity or retry token distinct from the one governed invocation
checks.name: failed-attempt and retry semantics

checks.acceptance_blocker: validation-to-execution drift remains possible after the I05 commit
checks.finding: the current validator binds accepted I04 commit b7b008c only; it does not bind a future commit containing I05 acceptance/freeze, interpreter/command identity, or clean authority files
checks.name: committed I05 authority and immediate preflight binding

checks.finding: the entry point does validate I04R2 identities, reject an existing governed output, and keep candidate authority false
checks.name: existing identity/output/candidate guards

checks.finding: the current main path builds once, writes once, then reconstructs by retained-output read/parse/reserialize without a second null generation
checks.name: readback-only reconstruction within the governed call

checks.acceptance_blocker: the required post-run safety facts cannot be reconstructed from retained machine records
checks.finding: the entry point emits the calibration record only; it retains no consumption receipt, separate counts, or second-invocation refusal witness
checks.name: retained attempt/reconstruction/refusal accounting

checks.finding: I05A parsed source and contracts only; no governed output exists
checks.name: zero-execution audit boundary
